# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Build an Elasticsearch snapshot configuration for automated backups. Configure snapshot repository to S3 or file share for the operations team. Implement snapshot creation and restoration functionality.
# Category: datastore_security

snapshot:
  frequency: "daily"
  time: "02:00" # Time to run the snapshot, in HH:MM format
  repository:
    type: "s3"
    settings:
      bucket: "your-s3-bucket-name"
      region: "your-region"
      access_key: "your-access-key-id"
      secret_key: "your-secret-access-key"

snapshot_repository:
  name: "s3_repository"
  type: "s3"
  settings:
    bucket: "your-s3-bucket-name"
    region: "your-region"
    access_key: "your-access-key-id"
    secret_key: "your-secret-access-key"
    compress: true

snapshot_creation:
  type: "API"
  endpoint: "/_snapshot/s3_repository/snapshot_name"
  method: "PUT"
  body:
    indices: "index_name_1,index_name_2"
    ignore_unavailable: true
    include_global_state: false

snapshot_restoration:
  type: "API"
  endpoint: "/_snapshot/s3_repository/snapshot_name/_restore"
  method: "POST"
  body:
    indices: "index_name_1,index_name_2"
    ignore_unavailable: true
    include_global_state: false
